  • Colleges in India 2026

Top Colleges in India 2026

Written By Amit Singh - Content Writer
Updated on - Feb 11, 2026 11:45 PM IST

India has developed a significant number of higher education institutions over time to meet the demand of the expanding youth population by providing quality education, so we have prepared a list of top colleges in India 2026. These colleges have established themselves not only nationally but also internationally. India has long been a centre for education worldwide. Students from over the world view Indian colleges as the best places to learn in large part due to a variety of factors including a rich, multifaceted culture, breakthroughs in technology, a broad selection of courses, well-equipped labs, and a low cost of living.

India has a vast education system with over 43,000 colleges and 1,100+ universities offering courses in a number of disciplines like engineering, medical, management, law and arts. Out of these, approximately 65.3% are private un-aided, 13.2% are private aided, and 21.5% are government colleges. Admissions to these colleges are based on various exams like CUET, JEE, CLAT, CAT, XAT, MAT, NEET, and other state and college specific exams. Some colleges also offer direct admission based on class 12th marks. The cutoffs for government colleges are usually high because of their affordability, and better reputation. Although some private colleges like BITS Pilani, IIIT Hyderabad, and others are as good as government colleges in terms of reputation.  

IITs and IIMs are renowned as centres of excellence. Numerous liberal arts colleges have recently been established in India in an effort to advance the multidisciplinary system of education. It not only offers students a substitute for Ivy League institutions but also demonstrates the bright future of liberal arts education in India. The most popular among these are Management (7893), Engineering (6705), Information Technology (6142), Commerce & Banking (4959), Hotel Management (1630), and Design (1505). For admissions, 1529 colleges accept CMAT, 710 accept CAT, 548 consider JEE Mains, 489 accept MAT, 326 take TNEA, and 320 recognize XAT. Hostel facilities are available in 5344 colleges for boys and 2202 for girls. This article lists top colleges in India based on multiple factors like placement, cutoff, fees, courses and others.

Particulars

Statistics

Recognitions and Affiliations 

  • Recognition: UGC
  • Accreditation: NAAC
  • Approval: AICTE
Top Specializations
  • Engineering
  • Architecture
  • Arts
  • Commerce
  • Management
  • Medical and more

Entrance Exam Accepted                                                                                   

  • CUET - UG
  • CUET - PG
  • IIT JAM
  • JEE Main 
  • NEET - UG & PG and more               

Top 25 Colleges in India Based on NIRF 2025

The National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) is India’s official annual ranking system for higher education institutions. It ranks universities, colleges, and professional schools across 11+ categories (including engineering, management, and medical) based on five main parameters: teaching, research, graduation outcomes, outreach, and perception. Here are the top 25 colleges that were ranked by NIRF and the popular courses they offer.

NIRF Rank 2025                                                     

College Name

City

Popular Courses Offered

1Indian Institute of Technology Madras                                                ChennaiBTech, MTech, MSc, MBA, PhD                                
2Indian Institute of ScienceBengaluru                                                  BSc, MTech, MSc, PhD
3Indian Institute of Technology BombayMumbaiBTech, MTech, MSc, MBA, PhD
4Indian Institute of Technology DelhiNew DelhiBTech, MTech, MSc, MBA, PhD
5Indian Institute of Technology KanpurKanpurBTech, MTech, MSc, MBA, PhD
6Indian Institute of Technology KharagpurKharagpurBTech, MTech, MBA, LLB, PhD
7Indian Institute of Technology RoorkeeRoorkeeBTech, MTech, MBA, MSc, PhD
8Indian Institute of Technology GuwahatiGuwahatiBTech, MTech, MSc, MBA, PhD
9All India Institute of Medical Sciences DelhiNew DelhiMBBS, MD, MS, BSc Nursing, PhD
10Jawaharlal Nehru UniversityNew DelhiBA, MA, MSc, MPhil, PhD
11Banaras Hindu UniversityVaranasiBA, BSc, BTech, MBBS, MBA
12Indian Institute of Technology HyderabadHyderabadBTech, MTech, MSc, PhD
13National Institute of Technology TiruchirappalliTiruchirappalliBTech, MTech, MBA, MSc
14University of DelhiNew DelhiBA, BSc, BCom, MA, MBA
15Indian Institute of Technology IndoreIndoreBTech, MTech, MSc, PhD
16IIT (BHU) VaranasiVaranasiBTech, MTech, PhD
17Jamia Millia IslamiaNew DelhiBA, BTech, MBA, MA, PhD
18Jadavpur UniversityKolkataBTech, MTech, BA, MA, PhD
19Anna UniversityChennaiBTech, MTech, MBA, MCA
20Manipal Academy of Higher EducationManipalBTech, MBBS, MBA, BSc, MSc
21University of HyderabadHyderabadMA, MSc, MBA, MTech, PhD
22Aligarh Muslim UniversityAligarhBA, BTech, MBBS, MBA
23Amrita Vishwa VidyapeethamCoimbatoreBTech, MTech, MBBS, MBA

Admission Process through CUET 

The Common University Entrance Examination (CUET) is the most popular exam for admission to undergraduate courses in some prominent universities like University of Delhi, Jamia Millia Islamia, Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University. The admission process through CUET is as follows.

  • Step-1 Register for CUET and Select Subjects - Candidates must first register for CUET on the official NTA portal. While filling the application form, students should carefully choose subjects according to the course-wise subject mapping prescribed by their preferred universities. Selecting incorrect subjects can lead to rejection during counselling, so this step is crucial.
  • Step-2 Appear for the CUET Exam - CUET is conducted in computer-based mode (CBT) at designated exam centres. The exam tests candidates on selected domain subjects, language papers, and/or the General Test, depending on the course requirements.
  • Step-3 Check Results and Download Scorecard - After the exam, NTA releases CUET results online. Candidates must download and save their CUET scorecard, which is mandatory for applying to participating universities.
  • Step-4 Apply to Universities Using CUET Scores - CUET scores do not automatically guarantee admission. Candidates must separately apply on the admission portals of universities they are interested in, such as Delhi University or Jamia Millia Islamia, using their CUET application number and scores.
  • Step-5 Merit Lists and Counselling - Universities prepare course-wise merit lists based on CUET scores, category, and eligibility criteria. Shortlisted candidates are invited to participate in online or offline counselling rounds conducted by the respective universities.
  • Step-6 Seat Allotment and Admission Confirmation - Based on merit rank and preferences, seats are allotted to candidates. Students must then verify documents, pay the admission fee, and confirm their seat within the specified deadline to secure admission.

The table below outlines the CUET schedule 2026 highlighting the important dates and details

Event

Date

CUET Registration StartJanuary 2026                                                                                                                                                
CUET Registration Last DateFebruary 04, 2026
Last Date to Pay Application Fee                                                                                                             February 07, 2026
Application Correction WindowFebruary 09 - February 11, 2026                                                                                                                  
CUET Admit Card ReleaseMay 2026
CUET Exam DatesMay 11 - May 31, 2026
CUET Result DeclarationJune 2026
CUET Counselling ProcessJune - July 2026
Exam ModeComputer Based Test (CBT)
Official Websitecuet.nta.nic.in

Admission Process through JEE Mains 

The Joint Entrance Examination (JEE) Mains is a crucial examination for engineering students. Most colleges in Delhi accept it for admission. Admission to engineering colleges is based on JoSAA counselling. Here is a step by step process explaining the same.

  • Step-1 Register for JEE Main - Candidates must first register for JEE Main on the official NTA portal. While filling out the application form, students need to enter personal and academic details, choose the exam session, select preferred exam cities, and upload the required documents. Timely and accurate form submission is essential to avoid rejection.
  • Step-2 Appear for the JEE Main Exam - JEE Main is conducted in computer-based mode (CBT) at designated exam centres. Paper 1 is conducted for BE/BTech, while Paper 2A and 2B are for BArch and BPlan. The exam tests candidates on Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics.
  • Step-3 Check Results and Download Scorecard - After the exam, NTA releases the JEE Main results online. Candidates must download and save their JEE Main scorecard, which contains percentile scores and All India Rank (AIR) required for counselling and admissions.
  • Step-4 Apply for Counselling Using JEE Main Scores - JEE Main scores do not automatically ensure admission. Candidates must apply through counselling processes such as JoSAA counselling for NITs, IIITs, and GFTIs. For engineering colleges in Delhi like DTU, NSUT, and IIIT Delhi, admissions are conducted through JAC Delhi counselling based on JEE Main ranks.
  • Step-5 Counselling and Seat Allotment - Counselling authorities prepare merit lists based on JEE Main rank, category, and preferences. Through JoSAA or JAC Delhi, candidates are allotted seats in multiple rounds depending on availability and choices filled.
  • Step-6 Admission Confirmation and Reporting - Once a seat is allotted, candidates must verify documents, pay the admission fee, and confirm the seat within the given deadline. Final admission is confirmed after reporting to the allotted institute or completing online verification.

The following table summarises the JEE Mains examination schedule for 2026. Candidates can go through the schedule and prepare accordingly.

Event

Date / Details

Notification ReleaseOctober 31, 2025
Application Start - Session 1October 31, 2025
Application Last Date - Session 1                                                                                                                             November 27, 2025
City Intimation Slip - Session 1January 08, 2026                                                                                                                          
Exam Dates - Paper 1 (BE/BTech)January 21, 22, 23, 24, 28, 2026
Exam Date - Paper 2A & 2B (BArch / BPlan)January 29, 2026
Application Start - Session 2January 31, 2026
Application Last Date - Session 2February 2026
Exam Dates - Session 2April 02 to April 09, 2026
Courses OfferedBE/BTech, BArch, BPlan
Exam ModeComputer Based Test (CBT)
Conducting AuthorityNational Testing Agency
Official Websitejeemain.nta.ac.in

Top Colleges in India 2025 - FAQs

Ques. What are some of the top colleges in India?

Ans. Some of the top colleges in India 2025 are Miranda House, Hindu College, Presidency College, Loyola College, Lady Shri Ram College for Women. These colleges are ranked as per the latest NIRF ranking 2025.

Ques. How many colleges are there in the state of Uttarakhand?

Ans. There are approximately 121 colleges present in the state of Uttarakhand. Nearly 3 constituent and 118 affiliated colleges are there in the state of Uttarakhand.

Ques. What factors are considered for carrying out the NIRF ranking?

Ans. Five factors are taken into consideration by the Ministry of Education while determining the NIRF rankings: Teacher, Learning & Resource (TLR), Research, Professional Practice & Collaborative Performance (RPC), Graduation Outcome (GO), Outreach and Inclusivity (OI), Perception (PR).

Ques. As per the placement records 2026, what are the top colleges in India?

Ans. As per the placement records 2025, some of the top colleges in India are IIT Delhi, IIT Madras, IIT Bombay, IIT Kharagpur and more. Some of the major recruiting participants at these colleges are Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Myntra, Flipkart, Cognizant, Havells, Infosys and more.

Ques. What are some of the top commerce colleges in India?

Ans. The top commerce colleges in India are Shri Ram College of Commerce, Lady Shri Ram College for Women, Loyola College, St. Xaviers' College, Symbiosis College of Arts and Commerce and Narsee Monjee College of Commerce and Economics.

Ques. What are the possible career options after pursuing BA literature courses in India?

Ans. Job profiles like content writer, HR executive, copywriter, scriptwriter, teacher, and journalist are some of the options that are available for literature graduates from reputed colleges in India.

Ques. Why are QS World University Rankings important?

Ans. The top universities in the world are ranked each year in 51 distinct and five composite sectors by Quacquarelli Symonds Limited's QS World University Rankings. This ranking helps us to identify the best colleges and universities in the country depending on various factors such as placement, entrance exam, admission process and more.

Ques. What are the top BA Hons programmes offered at the University of Delhi?

Ans. The most popular BA Hons programmes at the University of Delhi include BA Hons in English, BA Hons in Psychology, BA Hons in Economics, BA Hons in Political Science, and BA Hons in History.

Ques. What are some of India's most well-known university entrance exams?

Ans. CUET - UG & PG, TISSNET, Aligarh Muslim University Entrance Test, Calcutta University Entrance Exam, IIT JAM, and CPGET are a few of the top entrance exams that are considered for admission to various courses in India.

Ques. What are some of the top management colleges in India?

Ans. Some of the topmost management colleges in India are IIM Ahmedabad, IIM Bangalore, IIM Kolkata, IIT Delhi, and IIM Lucknow. Management courses are offered in a variety of specialisations to interested candidates such as human resources, aviation, hotel management and more.

Lady Shri Ram College for Women specialties

Placements : Consulting and Finance Powerhouse - Strong focus on Tier-1 Management Consulting, Investment Banking, and Analytics - Dedicated Placement Cell facilitating high-value roles in firms like McKinsey, BCG, and Bain
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : Global Academic Footprint - Active student exchange programs with international institutions such as La Trobe University and National University of Singapore - Collaborations for research and academic symposiums with global liberal arts universities
Hostel : Elite Residence Hall - On-campus Residence Hall offering a secure and vibrant community for approximately 300 students - Highly competitive merit-based admission, considered a prestigious residential experience within the University of Delhi
Infrastructure : Scenic 15-Acre Campus - 15-acre campus renowned for its award-winning 'Scenic Beauty' and meticulously maintained gardens - Spacious sports grounds including facilities for archery, basketball, and a dedicated wellness center
Region : Strategic South Delhi Location - Situated in Lajpat Nagar, providing immediate access to the national capital's corporate hubs and government ministries - Proximity to diplomatic missions and international cultural centers facilitates global networking and internship opportunities
Rankings : Top National Standing - Ranked #10 Nationally in the College Category by NIRF 2024 - Consistently ranked among the top 3 liberal arts colleges in India by major national surveys
Fees : Highly Subsidized Education - Rs 0.6 - 0.9 L (Total for 3 years) - Extremely low fee structure as a publicly funded constituent college of the University of Delhi
ROI : Best in Class ROI - Exceptional return on investment with average starting salaries often exceeding 15-20 times the annual tuition fee - Direct recruitment by global 'Big Three' consulting firms for undergraduate roles

AIIMS Delhi specialties

Specializations : Advanced Clinical Specializations - Home to specialized centers of excellence including the Cardio-Thoracic Sciences Centre, Neurosciences Centre, and Dr. B.R.A. Institute Rotary Cancer Hospital. - Pioneer in Robotic Surgery, Organ Transplantation, and Stem Cell Research in India.
Placements : Residency and Global Healthcare Leadership - Focus on securing prestigious Junior and Senior Residency positions within AIIMS or top global hospitals. - High success rate in USMLE, PLAB, and other international medical licensing exams.
Internships : High-Volume Clinical Exposure - Mandatory rotating internship at AIIMS Hospital, which handles millions of outpatients annually. - Hands-on experience with complex cases that are rarely seen in other medical institutions.
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : Global Research Collaborations - Active collaborations with international bodies like the World Health Organization (WHO) and National Institutes of Health (NIH), USA. - Student exchange programs and research partnerships with top-tier global universities like the University of Michigan.
Hostel : Residential Campus with Single Rooms - Guaranteed on-campus housing for all students; single rooms are typically allotted to senior students and residents. - A rare feature for undergraduate medical colleges in India, fostering a dedicated academic environment.
Infrastructure : 115-Acre Integrated Medical Campus - Sprawling 115+ acre campus in the heart of Delhi featuring state-of-the-art laboratories and digital libraries. - Includes specialized trauma centers (JPNATC) and dedicated research wings for advanced medical sciences.
Region : Strategic National Capital Location - Located in Ansari Nagar, New Delhi, providing direct proximity to the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare and international health organizations like WHO. - Strategic access to national-level policy-making bodies and premier research institutes like ICMR.
Rankings : Rank #1 Nationally - Consistently ranked #1 in the Medical category by NIRF (National Institutional Ranking Framework) for several consecutive years. - Recognized globally as an 'Institute of National Importance' by an Act of Parliament.
Fees : Low: Rs 0.05-0.06 L (Total) - The total academic fee for the entire MBBS course is approximately Rs 5,856, including tuition and hostel fees. - One of the most affordable medical educations globally due to heavy government subsidies.
ROI : Best - Unmatched Return on Investment with near-zero tuition costs and high-paying residency opportunities. - Graduates command the highest prestige and career prospects in the medical fraternity globally.
Flagship Courses : MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery) - The most sought-after medical degree in India with an extremely competitive selection process. - Curriculum integrates clinical training with cutting-edge medical research from the first year.
Specializations : Advanced Clinical Specializations - Home to specialized centers of excellence including the Cardio-Thoracic Sciences Centre, Neurosciences Centre, and Dr. B.R.A. Institute Rotary Cancer Hospital. - Pioneer in Robotic Surgery, Organ Transplantation, and Stem Cell Research in India.
Placements : Residency and Global Healthcare Leadership - Focus on securing prestigious Junior and Senior Residency positions within AIIMS or top global hospitals. - High success rate in USMLE, PLAB, and other international medical licensing exams.
Internships : High-Volume Clinical Exposure - Mandatory rotating internship at AIIMS Hospital, which handles millions of outpatients annually. - Hands-on experience with complex cases that are rarely seen in other medical institutions.
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : Global Research Collaborations - Active collaborations with international bodies like the World Health Organization (WHO) and National Institutes of Health (NIH), USA. - Student exchange programs and research partnerships with top-tier global universities like the University of Michigan.
Hostel : Residential Campus with Single Rooms - Guaranteed on-campus housing for all students; single rooms are typically allotted to senior students and residents. - A rare feature for undergraduate medical colleges in India, fostering a dedicated academic environment.
Infrastructure : 115-Acre Integrated Medical Campus - Sprawling 115+ acre campus in the heart of Delhi featuring state-of-the-art laboratories and digital libraries. - Includes specialized trauma centers (JPNATC) and dedicated research wings for advanced medical sciences.
Region : Strategic National Capital Location - Located in Ansari Nagar, New Delhi, providing direct proximity to the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare and international health organizations like WHO. - Strategic access to national-level policy-making bodies and premier research institutes like ICMR.
Rankings : Rank #1 Nationally - Consistently ranked #1 in the Medical category by NIRF (National Institutional Ranking Framework) for several consecutive years. - Recognized globally as an 'Institute of National Importance' by an Act of Parliament.
Fees : Low: Rs 0.05-0.06 L (Total) - The total academic fee for the entire MBBS course is approximately Rs 5,856, including tuition and hostel fees. - One of the most affordable medical educations globally due to heavy government subsidies.
ROI : Best - Unmatched Return on Investment with near-zero tuition costs and high-paying residency opportunities. - Graduates command the highest prestige and career prospects in the medical fraternity globally.
Flagship Courses : MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery) - The most sought-after medical degree in India with an extremely competitive selection process. - Curriculum integrates clinical training with cutting-edge medical research from the first year.
Specializations : Advanced Clinical Specializations - Home to specialized centers of excellence including the Cardio-Thoracic Sciences Centre, Neurosciences Centre, and Dr. B.R.A. Institute Rotary Cancer Hospital. - Pioneer in Robotic Surgery, Organ Transplantation, and Stem Cell Research in India.

National Institute of Design, Ahmedabad specialties

Diversity : Global & Artisan Integration - International Open Electives (Shilp Sangam) bring together artisans from 15+ Indian states and international experts. - Diverse student body representing every state in India and international exchange participants.
Internships : Elite Corporate Graduation Projects - Students complete final-year internships at companies like Microsoft, Samsung R&D, and Google. - Focus on real-world problem solving through industry-sponsored research labs.
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : 50+ Global Academic Alliances - Active student exchange programs with Lucerne University (Switzerland), ENSAD (France), and Cologne Academy of Media Arts (Germany). - Member of the International Council of Design (ICoD) and World Design Organization (WDO).
Almuni : Global Design Leaders - Rahul Mishra (International Fashion Designer), Sujata Keshavan (Founder, Ray+Keshavan). - Harun Robert (Media Personality/Artist), Dayanita Singh (Renowned Photographer).
Guest Lecturers : International Open Electives - Regular workshops by global design practitioners and traditional master craftsmen. - Industry experts from companies like Samsung and Adobe conduct specialized modules.
Hostel : On-Campus Residential Life - Hostel facilities available for all outstation B.Des students at the Paldi campus. - Safe, affordable residential blocks integrated with studio spaces for 24/7 creative access.
Infrastructure : 20-Acre Riverfront Campus - Iconic 20-acre campus situated along the Sabarmati Riverfront, designed by Charles Eames and Gira Sarabhai. - Knowledge Management Centre (KMC) housing one of Asia's best design-specific libraries and prototype collections.
Region : Strategic Design Hub - Located in Ahmedabad, India's first UNESCO World Heritage City, providing a rich cultural and architectural backdrop. - Strategic proximity to major textile, automotive, and manufacturing clusters in Gujarat.
Rankings : Rank #1 Nationally - Consistently ranked #1 in India for Design by IIRF and Outlook-ICARE 2024. - Ranked among the top 51-100 art and design institutes globally by QS World University Rankings 2022.
Fees : Mid/High Range - Rs 16.8 - 17.1 L (Total for 4-year B.Des) - Rs 11.0 - 12.0 L (Total for 2.5-year M.Des)
ROI : Excellent - High return on investment with average packages often exceeding 1.5x the annual tuition fee. - Access to elite global design roles and entrepreneurial support.
Flagship Courses : Bachelor of Design (B.Des) - Flagship 4-year program with a mandatory 1-year Foundation Programme. - Specializations in Communication Design, Industrial Design, and Textile Design.
Specializations : Multi-disciplinary Pedagogy - Unique curriculum structure allowing cross-disciplinary electives and collaborative projects. - Focus on 'Learning by Doing' through extensive studio-based workshops.
Placements : Industry Interface & Graduation Project - Mandatory 6-month Graduation Project in the final semester, often leading to direct PPOs. - Annual 'Industry Interface' event facilitating direct recruitment by global tech and lifestyle giants.
Diversity : Global & Artisan Integration - International Open Electives (Shilp Sangam) bring together artisans from 15+ Indian states and international experts. - Diverse student body representing every state in India and international exchange participants.
Internships : Elite Corporate Graduation Projects - Students complete final-year internships at companies like Microsoft, Samsung R&D, and Google. - Focus on real-world problem solving through industry-sponsored research labs.
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : 50+ Global Academic Alliances - Active student exchange programs with Lucerne University (Switzerland), ENSAD (France), and Cologne Academy of Media Arts (Germany). - Member of the International Council of Design (ICoD) and World Design Organization (WDO).
Almuni : Global Design Leaders - Rahul Mishra (International Fashion Designer), Sujata Keshavan (Founder, Ray+Keshavan). - Harun Robert (Media Personality/Artist), Dayanita Singh (Renowned Photographer).

Hostel : On-Campus Residential Life - Hostel facilities available for all outstation B.Des students at the Paldi campus. - Safe, affordable residential blocks integrated with studio spaces for 24/7 creative access.
Infrastructure : 20-Acre Riverfront Campus - Iconic 20-acre campus situated along the Sabarmati Riverfront, designed by Charles Eames and Gira Sarabhai. - Knowledge Management Centre (KMC) housing one of Asia's best design-specific libraries and prototype collections.
Region : Strategic Design Hub - Located in Ahmedabad, India's first UNESCO World Heritage City, providing a rich cultural and architectural backdrop. - Strategic proximity to major textile, automotive, and manufacturing clusters in Gujarat.
Rankings : Rank #1 Nationally - Consistently ranked #1 in India for Design by IIRF and Outlook-ICARE 2024. - Ranked among the top 51-100 art and design institutes globally by QS World University Rankings 2022.
Fees : Mid/High Range - Rs 16.8 - 17.1 L (Total for 4-year B.Des) - Rs 11.0 - 12.0 L (Total for 2.5-year M.Des)

National Institute of Fashion Technology, Navi Mumbai specialties

Top Recruiters : Diverse Sector Recruitment - Primary sectors include Retail (39%), Fashion Brands (20%), and Design Houses (19%). - Growing recruitment from E-commerce, Tech Solution Providers, and Home Furnishing companies.
Diversity : Inclusive Creative Environment - Strong female representation with a male-to-female ratio of approximately 14:86. - Pan-India student intake through a highly competitive national entrance exam.
Internships : High-Profile Industry Training - Mandatory 16-week industry internships with top firms like Fastrack, Tata, and various design startups. - Opportunities for international internships through global connect initiatives.
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : Global Connect Program - Dual Degree opportunity with the Fashion Institute of Technology (FIT), New York. - Exchange partnerships with NABA (Italy), ENSAIT (France), and RMIT (Australia).
Alumni : Industry Leaders - Notable alumni include Nikhil Thampi (Fashion Designer) and Manish Arora (Fashion Designer). - Alumni hold key positions in global brands like Zara, H&M, Benetton, and Reliance Brands.
Guest Lecturers : Expert-Led Learning - Regular sessions by industry veterans from companies like Arvind Fashions and Peter England. - Jury-based evaluations conducted by external industry professionals for portfolio development.
Hostel : On-Campus Residential Comfort - On-campus Girls' Hostel with a capacity of 588 students; Boys' Hostel capacity of 79. - Facilities include a gym, beauty parlour, TV room, and limited AC rooms (rare for government institutes).
Infrastructure : Modern 10-Acre Campus - State-of-the-art 10-acre campus in Kharghar featuring specialized CAD, Weaving, and Photography labs. - World-class Resource Centre (Library) housing rare design books and access to WGSN/Promostyl trend forecasting.
Region : Strategic Fashion Hub - Located in Kharghar, Navi Mumbai, providing direct proximity to Mumbai's garment export hubs and Bollywood. - Strategic access to headquarters of major retail giants and luxury brands in India's financial capital.
Rankings : Top-Tier National Standing - Ranked #2 Nationally by India Today (2024) and consistently in the Top 3 for Fashion Design. - Ranked #1 in Maharashtra, maintaining its status as the leading design institute in the region.
Fees : Premium Investment - Rs 13.42 L - Rs 14.09 L (Total for 4-year B.Des/B.FTech programs). - Standardized government-regulated fee structure across all NIFT campuses.
ROI : Excellent Value - High return on investment due to the prestigious NIFT brand and centralized placement opportunities. - Access to the 'Sarthak' and 'Udaan' scholarship schemes for financial assistance.
Flagship Courses : Flagship Design & Tech Programs - B.Des in Fashion Design and B.FTech in Apparel Production are the most sought-after flagship courses. - Specialized Master of Fashion Management (MFM) for industry leadership roles.
Specializations : Craft & Tech Integration - Mandatory 'Craft Cluster Initiative' that connects students with traditional Indian artisans for product innovation. - Specialized labs for Accessory Design, Jewelry, Leather, and Textile Testing.
Placements : Centralized Industry Access - Centralized placement process across 7 major campuses including Mumbai, Delhi, and Bengaluru. - 90%+ placement rate for specialized streams like Accessory Design.
Top Recruiters : Diverse Sector Recruitment - Primary sectors include Retail (39%), Fashion Brands (20%), and Design Houses (19%). - Growing recruitment from E-commerce, Tech Solution Providers, and Home Furnishing companies.
Diversity : Inclusive Creative Environment - Strong female representation with a male-to-female ratio of approximately 14:86. - Pan-India student intake through a highly competitive national entrance exam.

Alumni : Industry Leaders - Notable alumni include Nikhil Thampi (Fashion Designer) and Manish Arora (Fashion Designer). - Alumni hold key positions in global brands like Zara, H&M, Benetton, and Reliance Brands.

Armed Forces Medical College (AFMC), Pune

×
  • 4.1
    (8 Reviews)
  • Pune, Maharashtra
  • Public
  • MCI
    ...+2 NABL , NAAC

  • 90,210

    Get Fee Details

Armed Forces Medical College specialties

Placements : 100% Commissioning Rate - Direct recruitment into the Army Medical Corps (AMC), Navy, or Air Force - Placement as Lieutenant (or equivalent) with a clear career progression path to high military ranks
Diversity : Pan-India Representation - Strict merit-based selection via NEET-UG followed by ToELR and interview, ensuring a diverse student body from every state - Unified culture transcending regional and linguistic barriers through military ethos
Internships : Clinical Training at Command Hospitals - Compulsory rotating internship at Command Hospital (Southern Command), one of the largest tertiary care hospitals in India - Exposure to a vast variety of clinical cases and state-of-the-art medical technology
Almuni : Distinguished Military Leaders - Alumni include Lt Gen Punita Arora (First woman to reach the rank of Lt General) - Air Marshal Padma Bandopadhyay (First woman Air Marshal of the IAF)
Hostel : Mandatory Residential Discipline - Fully residential campus with separate, well-maintained hostels for boys and girls - Rare feature: Officers' Mess style dining and disciplined living environment that fosters camaraderie
Infrastructure : Expansive 110-Acre Campus - Sprawling 110-acre campus featuring a blend of heritage architecture and modern medical labs - Spacious sports grounds, Olympic-size swimming pool, and dedicated firing range for military training
Region : Strategic Military & Educational Hub - Located in Pune, the 'Oxford of the East', providing a rich academic ecosystem - Strategically situated near the Southern Command Headquarters, facilitating direct access to advanced military medical facilities
Rankings : Top-Tier National Standing - Ranked #30 Nationally in the Medical Category by NIRF 2024 - Consistently recognized as one of the top 5 medical colleges in India by various national surveys
Fees : Highly Subsidized Education - Low: Rs 1.0 - 1.5 L (Total for MBBS duration) - Education is heavily funded by the Ministry of Defence, though students must sign a mandatory service bond
ROI : Best Career Security - Guaranteed employment as a Class-I Gazetted Officer in the Indian Armed Forces upon successful completion - Immediate entry into a high-status professional career with comprehensive benefits
Flagship Courses : Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Integrated curriculum combining MUHS academic standards with military leadership training - Focus on producing 'Doctor-Soldiers' capable of performing in diverse terrains and conditions
Specializations : Military Medicine & Combat Care - Unique training in Aerospace Medicine, Marine Medicine, and High-Altitude Medical Research - Specialized focus on Combat Casualty Care and Disaster Management

National Institute of Fashion Technology, New Delhi specialties

Specializations : Craft Cluster & Design Innovation - Mandatory Craft Cluster Initiative where students work directly with Indian artisans to preserve and innovate traditional crafts - Advanced specializations in Artificial Intelligence in Fashion and Sustainable Design
Placements : Centralized Industry Integration - Centralized Placement Cell (CPC) facilitating recruitment across all 18 campuses from the Delhi headquarters - Focus on diverse roles including Design, Merchandising, Retail Management, and E-commerce
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : Global Academic Network - Strategic partnership with Fashion Institute of Technology (FIT), New York for dual degree and exchange programs - Active MoUs with 32+ international institutions including London College of Fashion and Swiss Textile College
Almuni : Industry Pioneers - Distinguished alumni include global designers like Sabyasachi Mukherjee, Ritu Beri, and Manish Arora - Alumni hold leadership positions in global brands like Nike, Adidas, and Gap
Hostel : On-Campus Residential Facilities - Dedicated girls' hostel within the Hauz Khas campus providing a secure environment in a prime city location - Equipped with modern amenities, Wi-Fi, and common recreational areas
Infrastructure : Specialized Urban Campus - Iconic red-brick campus featuring the National Resource Centre (NRC), one of India's largest fashion libraries - Advanced facilities including MAC Labs, 3D Printing, Photography Studios, and specialized Weaving/Dyeing labs
Region : Strategic Design Hub - Located in Hauz Khas, providing immediate proximity to major fashion houses, export firms, and the corporate headquarters of retail giants - Direct access to the rich cultural heritage of the capital and the vibrant contemporary design scene of South Delhi
Rankings : National Leader in Fashion - Consistently ranked #1 among fashion institutes in India by major national surveys (India Today, Outlook) - Recognized as a 'Centre of Excellence' by the Ministry of Textiles, Government of India
Fees : Mid-High Investment - Rs 13.5 - 14.8 L (Total for 4-year UG programs) - Fee structure includes tuition, library, and mediclaim charges as per official 2024-25 schedules
ROI : Excellent Career Trajectory - Highest brand value in the Indian fashion industry ensuring premium entry-level roles - Strong entrepreneurial support through the NIFT incubation cell
Flagship Courses : Bachelor of Design (B.Des) - Flagship specializations in Fashion Design, Accessory Design, and Fashion Communication - Curriculum integrated with the 'Craft Cluster Initiative' for grassroots level exposure
Specializations : Craft Cluster & Design Innovation - Mandatory Craft Cluster Initiative where students work directly with Indian artisans to preserve and innovate traditional crafts - Advanced specializations in Artificial Intelligence in Fashion and Sustainable Design
Placements : Centralized Industry Integration - Centralized Placement Cell (CPC) facilitating recruitment across all 18 campuses from the Delhi headquarters - Focus on diverse roles including Design, Merchandising, Retail Management, and E-commerce
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : Global Academic Network - Strategic partnership with Fashion Institute of Technology (FIT), New York for dual degree and exchange programs - Active MoUs with 32+ international institutions including London College of Fashion and Swiss Textile College

Region : Strategic Design Hub - Located in Hauz Khas, providing immediate proximity to major fashion houses, export firms, and the corporate headquarters of retail giants - Direct access to the rich cultural heritage of the capital and the vibrant contemporary design scene of South Delhi

St. Xaviers College, Mumbai specialties

Placements : Consulting & Media Powerhouse - Strong recruitment focus from 'Big Four' consulting firms and global investment banks - Dedicated Placement Cell providing industry-readiness workshops and mock interview sessions
Internships : Mandatory Industry Exposure - Compulsory 120-hour internship/On-Job Training (OJT) for undergraduate students - Recent internships at HUL, Morgan Stanley, Bain & Co, and Viacom 18
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : Global Academic Footprint - Exclusive Indian partner for the Harvard College in Asia Program (HCAP) - Active exchange MoUs with Sciences Po (France), University of Notre Dame (USA), and St. Louis University (USA)
Hostel : Rare On-Campus Residential Facility - On-campus Boys' Hostel with a capacity of 60-100 students, a rare feature in South Mumbai - Shared rooms (2-4 occupants) prioritized based on merit and distance
Infrastructure : Indo-Gothic Heritage Campus - Iconic 2.94-acre campus recognized as a heritage structure by the Mumbai Heritage Conservation Committee - Features 'The Woods' (scenic leisure space) and state-of-the-art Smith Centre for Audio-Visual Instruction (SCAVI)
Region : Strategic South Mumbai Location - Located in the Fort heritage district, the financial and cultural heart of Mumbai - Proximity to major corporate headquarters, media houses, and the Bombay Stock Exchange
Rankings : Top National Standing - Ranked #89 Nationally in the College Category by NIRF 2024 - Ranked #1 among Private Autonomous Colleges in India by Education World 2024-25
Fees : Highly Affordable Elite Education - Low/Mid: Rs 0.4 - 2.0 L (Total for 3 years) - Aided courses (BA/BSc) are exceptionally low-cost, while self-financing courses (BMS/BAMMC) remain competitive
ROI : Excellent Return on Investment - Median salary of Rs 6.0 LPA against a total tuition fee as low as Rs 40,000 for aided streams - High placement conversion rates in top-tier consulting and finance firms
Specializations : Interdisciplinary Honours Program - Unique 'Honours' program allowing students to earn extra credits through research and interdisciplinary projects - Mandatory Social Involvement Programme (SIP) integrating community service with academic learning

Hostel : Rare On-Campus Residential Facility - On-campus Boys' Hostel with a capacity of 60-100 students, a rare feature in South Mumbai - Shared rooms (2-4 occupants) prioritized based on merit and distance

Jawaharlal Nehru University specialties

Top Recruiters : Leading Employment Sectors - Government & Public Policy - Higher Education & Research
Diversity : Inclusive Academic Microcosm - Unique 'Deprivation Points' system ensures representation from the most backward districts of India - International student intake from over 30-35 countries across the globe
Internships : High-Impact Policy & Corporate Internships - Research internships at NITI Aayog, Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), and various Foreign Embassies - Corporate internships at Google, Amazon, and Adobe for technical and management students
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : Global Academic Linkages - Active MoUs with universities in 48 countries including University of Illinois (USA) and Freie Universitat Berlin (Germany) - Participation in prestigious Erasmus+ and SPARC international research projects
Almuni : Distinguished Global Leaders - S. Jaishankar (Minister of External Affairs, India) - Nirmala Sitharaman (Minister of Finance, India)
Guest Lecturers : Intellectual Hub for Global Thought Leaders - Frequent lectures by visiting Heads of State, Nobel Laureates, and International Diplomats - Regular seminars hosted by senior bureaucrats and policy experts from the Government of India
Hostel : Extensive Residential Campus - 18 residential hostels named after Indian rivers - Availability of Single Seated rooms for senior research scholars and PhD students
Infrastructure : Expansive Green Ecosystem - Sprawling 1,019.38-acre campus located on the rugged terrain of the Aravali hill range - Scenic Beauty: Home to 'Parthasarathy Rocks' (PSR) and rich biodiversity including peacocks and nilgais
Region : Strategic Capital Advantage - Located in the National Capital Territory, providing direct proximity to the Parliament, Ministries, and Foreign Embassies - Strategic access to premier national think tanks (IDSA, ORF) and international organizations for research and networking
Rankings : National Leadership in Higher Education - Rank #2 Nationally in the University Category (NIRF 2024) - Rank #10 Overall in India (NIRF 2024)
Fees : Highly Subsidized Elite Education - Label: Low - Rs 0.01 - 12.0 L (Total)
ROI : Unmatched Value Proposition - ROI Tag: Best - Near-zero tuition fees for research and humanities courses lead to the highest return on investment in the Indian public education sector
Flagship Courses : Global Standards in Social Sciences & Languages - M.A. in International Relations (School of International Studies) - M.A. in Foreign Languages (School of Language, Literature and Culture Studies)
Specializations : Premier Research Schools - School of International Studies (SIS) is the oldest and most prestigious center for global affairs in India - School of Language, Literature and Culture Studies (SLL&CS) offers rare specializations in over 10 foreign languages
Placements : Diverse Career Pathways - Sector Focus: Public Policy, Research, Diplomacy, IT/Software, and Financial Services - Strong focus on Civil Services (UPSC) and International Organizations (UN, World Bank)
Top Recruiters : Leading Employment Sectors - Government & Public Policy - Higher Education & Research
Diversity : Inclusive Academic Microcosm - Unique 'Deprivation Points' system ensures representation from the most backward districts of India - International student intake from over 30-35 countries across the globe
Internships : High-Impact Policy & Corporate Internships - Research internships at NITI Aayog, Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), and various Foreign Embassies - Corporate internships at Google, Amazon, and Adobe for technical and management students

  • WBCHSE Exams

    ...+3 NCHMCT JEE , CBSE 12th , NCHM MSc JEE

Institute of Hotel Management Catering Technology & Applied Nutrition, Kolkata specialties

Specializations : Core Operational Excellence - Intensive focus on Food Production, F&B Service, Front Office, and Housekeeping - Unique 'Vegetarian Only' option available for B.Sc. and Diploma students
Placements : Management Trainee (MT) Pipeline - Primary focus on prestigious Management Trainee programs like OCLD (Oberoi) and Taj Management Training - Diversified placements in MICE (Jio World Centre), Retail (Reliance Brands), and QSR (Starbucks)
Internships : Elite Industrial Training - Mandatory internships at marquee properties including Taj Bengal, ITC Sonar, and The Oberoi Grand - International internship opportunities in regions like the Maldives (Four Seasons)
Hostel : Merit-Based Residential Facilities - Separate on-campus hostels for boys (150+ capacity) and girls (65+ capacity) - Single room options available for final-year students based on academic merit and rank
Infrastructure : Specialized Urban Training Campus - Features advanced labs: Basic Training Kitchen (BTK), Quantity Food Kitchen (QFK), and Advanced Training Kitchen (ATK) - In-house training restaurants 'Gourmet' and 'Renaissance' for real-world service simulation
Region : Strategic Hospitality Hub - Located in Taratala, providing direct access to Kolkata's luxury hotel corridor (Taj Bengal, ITC Royal Bengal, The Oberoi Grand) - Strategic gateway for placements in the burgeoning hospitality markets of Eastern India and Southeast Asia
Rankings : Top-Tier National Standing - Ranked #6 Nationally in the Hotel Management category by IIRF 2024 - Consistently recognized as the #1 Hotel Management Institute in Eastern India
Fees : Mid-Range Government Subsidized Fees - Rs 3.38 - 4.87 L (Total for 3-year B.Sc. HHA) - Significantly more affordable than private hospitality schools while offering superior industry recognition
ROI : Excellent Return on Investment - High placement-to-fee ratio with students often securing Management Trainee roles starting at Rs 4-6 LPA - 100% placement assistance for eligible students across luxury and retail sectors
Flagship Courses : B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Flagship program delivered in collaboration with NCHMCT and IGNOU - Includes a mandatory 17-week Industrial Training (IT) module in 5-star properties
Specializations : Core Operational Excellence - Intensive focus on Food Production, F&B Service, Front Office, and Housekeeping - Unique 'Vegetarian Only' option available for B.Sc. and Diploma students
Placements : Management Trainee (MT) Pipeline - Primary focus on prestigious Management Trainee programs like OCLD (Oberoi) and Taj Management Training - Diversified placements in MICE (Jio World Centre), Retail (Reliance Brands), and QSR (Starbucks)

International Institute of Hotel Management, Kolkata specialties

Flagship Courses : B.Sc. (Hons) International Hospitality Management: Dual degree program in collaboration with the University of West London (UWL). Curriculum aligned with international standards, making graduates eligible for global work permits.
Internships : Global Industrial Exposure: Mandatory international internships in countries like France, USA, UK, and Singapore. Partnerships with global chains such as Marriott International and Hilton for structured trainee programs.
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : University of West London (UWL) Collaboration: Students have the option to complete their final year at the UWL campus in London. Global exchange programs through the Young Chef Olympiad network involving 50+ countries.
Hostel : Modern Residential Comforts: Separate hostel facilities for boys and girls with options for AC and non-AC rooms. Equipped with modern amenities including Wi-Fi, common rooms, and 24/7 security.
Infrastructure : State-of-the-Art Training Facilities: Features high-tech training kitchens, mock bars, and a dedicated 'Indus' training restaurant. Urban campus design focused on simulating real-world luxury hotel environments.
Region : Strategic Hospitality Hub: Located in Salt Lake, Kolkata, the city's primary IT and commercial corridor. Proximity to major luxury hotel clusters including Hyatt Regency, Taj City Centre, and JW Marriott provides immediate industry interface.
Rankings : National Leadership in Hospitality Education: Ranked #1 Hotel Management Institute in West Bengal by GHRDC-CSR Survey 2023. Consistently featured in the 'Super Excellence' category nationally by Competition Success Review.
Fees : Mid-High Investment for Global Degree: Rs 5.5 - 7.8 L (Total) for the 3-year degree program. Includes international certification and dual-degree options.
ROI : Excellent Global Returns: High ROI driven by international placement opportunities in the UK, USA, and Middle East. Access to global alumni networks significantly enhances long-term career progression.

Maulana Azad Medical College specialties

Placements : Elite Residency & Research Pathways - Focus on securing Senior Residency in top government institutes like AIIMS and PGI Chandigarh - High success rate in USMLE and PLAB for international medical practice
Top Recruiters : Healthcare & Clinical Research - Public Healthcare (Central/State Government Hospitals) - Private Healthcare Groups (Apollo, Max, Fortis)
Internships : Massive Clinical Exposure - Mandatory internship at Lok Nayak Hospital (2000+ beds) and G.B. Pant Hospital - Exposure to over 7,200 daily outpatients, providing unmatched hands-on diagnostic experience
Almuni : Global Medical Leaders - Dr. S.K. Sarin (Director, ILBS and Padma Bhushan recipient) - Dr. Upendra Kaul (Renowned Cardiologist and Padma Shri recipient)
Hostel : Extensive Residential Complex - 8 dedicated hostels on campus for UG, PG, and Interns - Single room availability for senior students and residents, a rare feature in government medical colleges
Infrastructure : Expansive 122-Acre Medical Hub - Sprawling 122-acre campus in Central Delhi, significantly larger than most urban medical colleges - Integrated complex featuring 2,800 beds across four major associated hospitals
Region : Strategic Central Delhi Location - Located at Bahadur Shah Zafar Marg, providing proximity to national health administrative bodies and major transit hubs - Situated in the heart of the capital, offering students access to diverse clinical cases from across North India
Rankings : Top-Tier National Standing - Ranked #24 Nationally in the Medical category by NIRF 2024 - Consistently ranked among the Top 5 Medical Colleges in India by India Today and The Week
Fees : Highly Subsidized Education - Rs 0.12 - 0.15 L (Total MBBS Course Fee) - Annual tuition fees are approximately Rs 240, making it one of the most affordable elite medical educations globally
ROI : Best in Category ROI - Minimal financial investment paired with high-prestige clinical training - Graduates secure high-paying residency positions and fellowships immediately upon completion
Flagship Courses : MBBS & Super-Specialty Programs - MBBS is the flagship program with an annual intake of 250 students - Renowned for MD/MS and M.Ch/DM super-specialties in Cardiology and Neurosurgery
Specializations : Advanced Tertiary Care Training - Specialized training at G.B. Pant Institute (GIPMER) for Cardiology, Neurology, and GI Surgery - Access to 47 operation theatres and specialized trauma care at Sushruta Trauma Centre
Placements : Elite Residency & Research Pathways - Focus on securing Senior Residency in top government institutes like AIIMS and PGI Chandigarh - High success rate in USMLE and PLAB for international medical practice
Top Recruiters : Healthcare & Clinical Research - Public Healthcare (Central/State Government Hospitals) - Private Healthcare Groups (Apollo, Max, Fortis)
Internships : Massive Clinical Exposure - Mandatory internship at Lok Nayak Hospital (2000+ beds) and G.B. Pant Hospital - Exposure to over 7,200 daily outpatients, providing unmatched hands-on diagnostic experience
Almuni : Global Medical Leaders - Dr. S.K. Sarin (Director, ILBS and Padma Bhushan recipient) - Dr. Upendra Kaul (Renowned Cardiologist and Padma Shri recipient)

Region : Strategic Central Delhi Location - Located at Bahadur Shah Zafar Marg, providing proximity to national health administrative bodies and major transit hubs - Situated in the heart of the capital, offering students access to diverse clinical cases from across North India

National Institute of Technology, Surathkal specialties

Placements : Elite Tech & Finance Recruitment - 93% placement rate for B.Tech students in the 2025 cycle - Strong focus on Software Development, Quantitative Finance, and Core Engineering sectors
Internships : Top-Tier Corporate Exposure - Students secure high-stipend internships at global giants including Google, Microsoft, and Goldman Sachs - Strong industry-institute linkage facilitating year-round project opportunities
Partnerships/Exchange Programs : Global Academic Collaborations - Active MoUs with international universities such as Kumamoto University (Japan) and University of Agder (Norway) - Research partnerships with premier national bodies like ISRO and Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL)
Hostel : Modern Residential Infrastructure - Features the 'Mega Tower' residential complex with modern amenities - Offers single-seater room availability for senior students, a rare comfort in the NIT system
Infrastructure : 295-Acre Beachfront Campus - Sprawling 295.35-acre campus featuring its own private beach on the Arabian Sea - Includes an international-standard swimming pool and a 24/7 Central Computer Centre
Region : Strategic Coastal Industrial Hub - Located in the industrial corridor of Mangaluru, providing direct proximity to major firms like MRPL, BASF, and MCF - Strategic access to the New Mangalore Port, facilitating specialized research in Marine and Coastal Engineering
Rankings : Top-Tier National Standing - Ranked #17 Nationally in the Engineering category by NIRF 2025 - Ranked #54 Nationally in the Overall category by NIRF 2025
Fees : Government Subsidized Excellence - Rs 5.7 - 6.02 L (Total) for the 4-year B.Tech program - Highly competitive fee structure compared to private Tier-1 institutions
ROI : Excellent Return on Investment - Exceptional ROI with average B.Tech packages frequently exceeding 3x the annual tuition fee - Strong median salary growth across all engineering disciplines
Specializations : Marine & Coastal Engineering Focus - Unique research and academic focus on Coastal Engineering and Marine Structures due to its seaside location - Home to specialized labs for wave mechanics and ocean energy research

FAQs

Which are the top 10 private engineering colleges in India in 2025?

The leading private engineering colleges include BITS Pilani, VIT Vellore, SRM University, Manipal Institute of Technology, Amity University, Shiv Nadar University, IIIT Hyderabad (deemed private), PES University, Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology, and UPES Dehradun. These colleges offer strong industry connections and placements

What is the rank of Indian universities in the world in 2025?

In global rankings, IISc Bangalore, IIT Bombay, and IIT Delhi feature in the top 200 of the QS World University Rankings 2025. IIT Madras and IIT Kanpur follow closely. These institutions are globally recognized for research and STEM education.

Which are the top 10 universities in India in 2025?

As of 2025, top Indian universities include IIT Madras, IISc Bangalore, IIT Delhi, JNU, Banaras Hindu University (BHU), Delhi University, University of Hyderabad, Jamia Millia Islamia, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, and Manipal Academy of Higher Education. These are evaluated on academics, research, and innovation.

What are the best government colleges in India in 2025?

Government-run top institutions include IITs (like IIT Delhi, IIT Bombay), IIMs (such as IIM Ahmedabad and IIM Bangalore), AIIMS New Delhi, JNU, IISc Bangalore, and NITs like NIT Trichy and NIT Surathkal. These institutions are known for quality education and national prestige.

Which are the top private colleges in India in 2025?

Top private colleges across India include BITS Pilani, VIT Vellore, SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Amity University Noida, Manipal Institute of Technology, Ashoka University, Shiv Nadar University, and Symbiosis Pune. These colleges perform well in engineering, science, liberal arts, and business.

What are the top engineering colleges in India in 2025?

The top engineering colleges for 2025 are IIT Madras, IIT Delhi, IIT Bombay, IIT Kanpur, IIT Kharagpur, NIT Trichy, IIIT Hyderabad, BITS Pilani, VIT Vellore, and BITS Pilani Hyderabad. IITs dominate for government institutes, while BITS and IIITs lead the private list.

Which are the top colleges in Delhi in India 2025?

Top Delhi-based institutions in 2025 include IIT Delhi, AIIMS Delhi, Delhi University (especially colleges like St Stephens and Miranda House), Jawaharlal Nehru University (JNU), Indian Institute of Foreign Trade (IIFT), and Jamia Millia Islamia. These are consistently ranked high across engineering, medical, and liberal arts streams.
